title: navarretia tagetina
intro: Navarretia tagetina, also known as the sand showy-pinks or showy pinks, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Navarretia tagetina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Navarretia tagetina can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots in tincture form.
